extracted.title: STT Imbalance Notice -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
Sabal Trail Transmission, LLC (STT) has limited operational flexibility and as a result, effective 9:00 AM CCT, January 24, 2026, STT requires all delivery point operators to keep actual daily takes out of the system equal to or less than scheduled quantities regardless of their cumulative imbalance position unless otherwise coordinated with your operations account representative.

Correspondingly, effective 9:00 AM CCT, January 24, 2026, the previously posted imbalance notice is no longer in effect.

This notice will remain in effect until further notice.

Please call your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
